channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: As U.S.-Israeli war with Iran intensifies, Trump says it is "very far ahead of schedule" - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: As U.S.-Israeli war with Iran intensifies, Trump says it is "very far ahead of schedule"  CBS News

  3. Did Trump just implicate US in deadly Iran school strike?  Sky News
  4. Iran war may end ‘pretty quickly’: What Trump told Republicans  Al Jazeera
  5. Oil prices seesaw as Trump sends mixed messages on what’s next in Iran  The Washington Post

item.title: After oil, war of water? Why desalination plants are turning into targets in Middle East – explained - The Times of India
